title: Glowing Animated Ores
description: glowing and animated ores that glow in night and also in darkness effect and versions are from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time i present you "Glowing Animated Ores" texture pack aka Resource pack
this pack specially glow and animate all kind of Ores.
this pack glowing and animation are visiable in both day and night.
this pack even work in cave, under water, and also in darkness effect.
this pack just given and animation and glow to the ores.
animation and glowing helps to locate the ores easly.

Every Ores have glow and animation.
and it also glow the raw iron, raw copper and raw gold.

mods for glowing
-Continuity
or
-Optifine
Emissive Texture should Turn on.

Change are:-

1)all types of ores [coal,copper,diamond,emerald,gold,iron,lapis,redstone]
2)all types of deepslate ores [coal,copper,diamond,emerald,gold,iron,lapis,redstone]
3)ancient debris
4)gilded blackstone
5)nether gold
6)nether quartz
7)raw copper
8)raw gold
9)raw iron
10)all types of ingot [copper,iron,gold,netherite]
11)raw iron,raw gold,raw copper
12)amethyst shard,echo shard
13)diamond
14)emerald
15)ender eye,ender pearl
16)redstone,sugar,glowstone,gunpowder
17)dragon breath bottle,experience bottle
18)fire charge
19)lapis lazuli
20)netherite scrap
21)quartz
22)glow ink sac
23)ghast tear
24)prismarine shard
25)prismarine crystals
26)Creaking Heart
27)Resin block
28)Resin brick
29)Resin clump

[N6]update-
30)Cobweb
31)Jack o lantern
32)Daylight Detector
33)all types of corals[corals ,coral blocks , coral fans]
 

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.


version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 
Enjoy the "Glowing Animated Ores"Pack.

 
THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
